seoTitle: St Agnes vs St George — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between St Agnes and St George. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: St Agnes vs St George: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in St Agnes and St George.
heading: St Agnes vs St George — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between St Agnes, Queensland and St George, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: St George has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to St Agnes (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is St Agnes or St George safer from flooding?
faq.answer: St Agnes has a flood risk score of 24/100, while St George scores 57/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: St Agnes scores 40/100 for bushfire risk. St George scores 49/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in St Agnes or St George?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. St George has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.8% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
